name: Gumloop
description: Interact with Gumloop. This official Gumloop MCP integration is installable through Cline.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Remote MCP / SSE via mcp-remote for unsupported clients. Auth from source catalog: OAuth plus Gumloop API key. Official Gumloop remote MCP server for workflows, agents, sessions, skills, artifacts, teams, connected MCP server management, documentation, and audit logs.
